name: TestMu AI
description: Full-stack agentic AI quality engineering platform providing agent-to-agent testing. Uses autonomous evaluators to validate and secure AI-driven systems with multi-modal testing support.
capabilities: Quality metrics assessment (accuracy, bias, hallucination detection)
AI-native test case generation from multiple formats
Real-time testing across devices and browsers
pricing: Custom enterprise pricing with usage-based tiers
notes: Major enhancements released March 2026. Focuses on autonomous evaluation of AI agents across real-world scenarios. Available on AWS Marketplace and Microsoft Marketplace. Particularly strong for validating conversational and voice-based agents.
